rules.name: lly-enters-first-buy-zone
rules.position_suggestion_cn: 建议仓位：先建 25% 分批仓，若 900-910 区间止跌企稳，再加到 40%-50%。
rules.position_suggestion_en: Position sizing: start with a 25% scale-in position. If LLY stabilizes in the 900-910 area, add toward 40%-50%.

rules.name: lly-reclaims-20dma-area
rules.title_cn: 礼来收复 20 日线区域
rules.position_suggestion_cn: 建议仓位：先建 20% 右侧确认仓，若继续站上并接近 50 日线，再扩大仓位。
rules.position_suggestion_en: Position sizing: start with a 20% right-side confirmation position, then add only if price keeps holding and pushes toward the 50-day average.
